claims.summary: Sequential telemetry handling may create an integration stall even without an unbounded queue.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded high-load observation using existing pipeline and lock timing rather than inferring absence of felt delay.

claims.summary: Telemetry trend and connection state should remain memory-bounded.
claims.disposition: Verified bounded pressure-trend windows and bounded connection diagnostics; no unbounded telemetry accumulation was found in the inspected path.

claims.summary: Changing reconnect backoff, buffering, or packet ordering alters live telemetry availability.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait for those live behavior changes.
